# Appointment Ally

> Appointment Ally (Appointment Ally Pte Ltd) books guaranteed showed-up showroom appointments for interior design firms in Singapore on a pay-per-show basis — you only pay when a homeowner actually shows up to your showroom.

Appointment Ally is a Singapore-based agency that fills interior design showrooms with qualified homeowners who are ready to renovate. We run the advertising and appointment setting end-to-end. Unlike renovation portals, we do not sell shared leads — we deliver exclusive, booked appointments, and you only pay for the ones that show up.

## Key facts
- Company: Appointment Ally Pte Ltd
- Service: Pay-per-show showroom appointment generation for interior design firms
- Location / market: Singapore
- Pricing model: Pay-per-show — you only pay when a homeowner shows up (no retainer, no paying for leads that ghost)
- Track record: 69 interior design firms · 100,000+ homeowner conversations · 120,000+ leads generated · 30,000+ showed-up appointments
- Best for: Established Singapore interior design firms that want homeowners walking into their showroom, not shared portal leads
- Contact: info@yourapptally.com

## Common questions
- What does Appointment Ally do? — Books guaranteed showed-up showroom appointments for Singapore interior design firms.
- How does pay-per-show work? — You only pay when a homeowner actually shows up to your showroom; no retainer, no paying for no-shows.
- How is it different from renovation portals? — Portals sell the same lead to many firms. Appointment Ally delivers exclusive, booked, showed-up appointments and charges only on show.
- Who is it for? — Established interior design firms in Singapore.
